nodes.name: Illadopsis
nodes.summary: Illadopsis（Illadopsis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联9种鸟类，如Brown illadopsis、Pale-breasted illadopsis、Tanzanian illadopsis等9种鸟类。

nodes.name: Pale-breasted illadopsis
nodes.summary: Pale-breasted illadopsis（Illadopsis rufipennis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Pale-breasted illadopsis。

nodes.name: 鸟纲

nodes.name: 动物界

nodes.name: Pale-breasted illadopsis
nodes.summary: The pale-breasted illadopsis (Illadopsis rufipennis) is a species of bird in the family Pellorneidae. It is found throughout the African tropical rainforest (including Bioko). The Tanzanian illadopsis was formerly considered a subspecies. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical moist montane forest. References
